scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-Agent: Avaya J179 IP Phone 4.0.2.1.3 c81fea85c1d6 User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186683 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41560 RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20

PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK RAck: 1 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 PRACK RAck: 2 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 PRACK RAck: 3 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

CANCEL sip:[field1]@192.168.56.202:6025 SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 CANCEL Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
